name: Wrong Escape
detailed_description: Wrong Escape is a short escape room puzzle game where you apply to participate in a psychological experiment. After entering the first room, you find out that one of the scientists working there change the puzzles and will not let you leave until you figure out his solutions. Once you figure that out and leave the first room, you will enter the second room. In this room you're surrounded with buttons. Each of them drops a random object. Your goal is to figure out how to use them to get to and open the door above you. In doing that you will find out that the company behind these experiments is actually evil and is allowing the scientist to conduct his experiments on purpose. After you find the real way to escape the second room you will wake up in the third room wich is still in development.
